step_by_step_thinking:
Tool Call: retrieve("effectiveness of sotrovimab in treating mild to moderate COVID-19 in recent years")

Retrieved Documents: 32 documents

First write up to two sentences explaining why you agree/disagree with the prior conclusions, then give your final answer choice.
After reviewing the latest evidence, I confirm that sotrovimab is authorized by the FDA for outpatient treatment of mild to moderate COVID-19 in high-risk adults and children, particularly those at risk of progressing to severe disease. While its efficacy has diminished against later variants like Omicron, multiple sources affirm its continued use in defined patient populations where it remains clinically valuable despite evolving virology.
